articles.title: Sturgeon says she was deceived and betrayed by estranged husband over SNP embezzlement
articles.description: The former first minister said she was "coming to terms with being married to someone she did not know" after Peter Murrell's guilty plea.

articles.title: Opportunities shrinking for too many young people, says major report on 'lost generation'
articles.description: A report warns the number of 16 to 24-year-olds out of work, education or training is set to rise to 1.25 million by 2031.

articles.title: 'I've applied for more than 400 roles' - how young people are facing the job shortage
articles.description: The BBC has been hearing from young people who are struggling to find work about how they are tackling the challenge.

articles.title: Man jailed for 15 years over plot to attack Taylor Swift concert in Vienna
articles.description: A 21-year-old Austrian man admitted planning the attack and other terrorism-related offences.
